summary: Lead Backend Engineer with 10+ years of experience building distributed systems, blockchain infrastructure and high-performance backend services. Strong expertise in Scala, backend architecture, PostgreSQL optimization, API design and production systems. Passionate about functional programming, clean software design and scalable distributed architectures, with a proven ability to quickly adapt to new technologies and challenging domains.

experience.description: Led the development and long-term evolution of the Explorer Backend, a PostgreSQL-based system indexing and serving more than 100 million blockchain records while continuously synchronizing with the blockchain network. Also contributed to the core blockchain node (networking, APIs and wallet) and led the Ralph Language Server initiative to improve the developer experience across editors.

experience.role: Progressed from Intern to Senior Scala Engineer
experience.description: Developed and scaled cloud-based software for autonomous vehicle fleets, contributing to backend architecture, real-time data processing and production deployments for large-scale transportation systems.

education.institution: EPFL - Swiss Federal Institute of Technology Lausanne
